SEC. 1101(a)(8) section 529: $4.149B reduction (from $4,309M to $160M) is the largest single anomaly in the bill
SEC. 1101(a)(2) section 521(a)(4): $2.88B reduction (from $12,440M to $9,560M) is the second largest anomaly
SEC. 1111 nullifies all FY2024 earmarks/community project funding — a significant policy change
